cta.title: Have a Question?
cta.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is happy to answer your dental health questions.

hero.title: Dental Health Blog
hero.subtitle: Tips, guides, and insights from our dental team to help you maintain a healthy, confident smile

introduction.text: Stay informed about your dental health with articles written by Dr. Alex Chen and Dr. Sarah Kim. From treatment comparisons to prevention tips, our blog is here to help you make confident decisions about your oral care.
